'''bapunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:poculation|poculation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poculation|poculation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bapunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæpinith|bæpinith]] || [[word:bæpinij|bæpinij]] || [[word:bæpinish|bæpinish]] || [[word:bæpini|bæpini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bapupunuth|bapupunuth]] || [[word:bapupunuj|bapupunuj]] || [[word:bapupunush|bapupunush]] || [[word:bapupunu|bapupunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bapunuth|bapunuth]] || [[word:bapunuj|bapunuj]] || [[word:bapunush|bapunush]] || [[word:bapunu|bapunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bapufnuth|bapufnuth]] || [[word:bapufnuj|bapufnuj]] || [[word:bapufnush|bapufnush]] || [[word:bapufnuf|bapufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bapunuthu|bapunuthu]] || [[word:bapunuju|bapunuju]] || [[word:bapunushu|bapunushu]] || [[word:bapunuku|bapunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bapunuth|bapunuth]] || [[word:bapunuj|bapunuj]] || [[word:bapunush|bapunush]] || [[word:bapunu|bapunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bapunuthul|bapunuthul]] || [[word:bapunujul|bapunujul]] || [[word:bapunushul|bapunushul]] || [[word:bapunukul|bapunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bapunuthuthu|bapunuthuthu]] || [[word:bapunujuju|bapunujuju]] || [[word:bapunushushu|bapunushushu]] || [[word:bapunuku|bapunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bapunuthun|bapunuthun]] || [[word:bapunujun|bapunujun]] || [[word:bapunushun|bapunushun]] || [[word:bapunukun|bapunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bapunuthuoro|bapunuthuoro]] || [[word:bapunujuoro|bapunujuoro]] || [[word:bapunushuoro|bapunushuoro]] || [[word:bapunukuoro|bapunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
